name: Cardputer Keyboard
author: clawdputer
description: M5Cardputer matrix keyboard scanner. Mirrors M5Cardputer's IOMatrixKeyboardReader: 3 active-high outputs (COL_A/B/C) drive a 74HC138-style column selector, 7 pulled-up inputs (ROW0..ROW6) read row state. Pressed keys are configured via the `keys` attribute as a comma-separated list of (x,y) cells.
